properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: Isopropyl analog (branched analog) of 2C-P with a slightly shorter duration and lower potency.
properties.test-kits: Marquis: Orange > Red. | Mecke: Yellow > Brown. | Mandelin: Green. | Ehrlich: No colour change.
